goals: Verify the successful submission of the Contact Us form, including file upload, and the display of the success message.
Verify successful navigation to the home page after interacting with the contact form.
activities: Verify the 'GET IN TOUCH' text element is visible.
Fill the Contact Us form with name, email, subject, and message.
Verify the success message is displayed.
Click the Home button and dismiss any overlaying ads.
Verify the browser has navigated to the home page URL.
